The lexer includes rules for parsing various token types, including literals, identifiers, operators, and comments, with no signs of malicious payloads or embedded external code. Custom parse error handling rethrows errors as SyntaxError, which is standard. The input processing and node creation are typical for a parser of JavaScript code, with no malicious signals or hidden behavior.",
